recut_note: Re-cut 2026-07-18 against the committed deploy-hardening candidate: source_commit and tests_and_build re-established from a fresh full local suite (167 files / 843 tests, Astro 0 errors / 0 warnings / 356 hints). deploy_approval and post_deploy_observation remain scoped to the last deployed commit bf4c424; deploying this candidate is separately gated. Seven owner and runtime gates remain pending by design, so the packet stays not-ready.

source_commit.summary: The Parent Coach Desk deploy-hardening candidate was staged in full and committed as immutable local Git commits on top of 0ccd55f (auto-remediation, maintenance write-class exemption, smoke attestation and per-caller hash reconciliation). The Git revision at handoff is authoritative; no push or deployment is implied.
evidence: git diff --cached --check before local release commit
clean Git worktree immediately after local release commit

production_manifest.summary: Local production manifest contract passes against production configuration.

tests_and_build.summary: Local unit and integration suites, coverage floors, Astro diagnostics and the exact production build passed for the committed deploy-hardening candidate; deployment remains separately gated.
evidence: 157 unit test files and 799 unit tests passed on 2026-07-18
10 integration test files and 44 integration tests passed on 2026-07-18
Full local suite total: 167 test files and 843 tests passed on 2026-07-18
The deploy-hardening candidate added 24 unit tests with no source regression
Coverage floors last measured 2026-07-17: 70.08% statements, 61.64% branches, 71.02% functions, 73.63% lines
The disposable-D1 integration suite is explicitly single-threaded after the default fork pool produced an incomplete run with a worker crash
Astro check: 0 errors, 0 warnings and 356 hints on 2026-07-18

Production build compiles clean on the candidate; the additive changes do not alter the generated deployment manifest, which passed its contract on identical slice code; reconfirm with npm run check:production-manifest on the landing machine before the gated deploy

Route, cache, rate-limit, mobile, privacy-claim, trust-response, approval, delivery-ambiguity, deletion-lifecycle, notification-outbox, commerce test-mode, affiliate-claim, newsletter-provider, deploy auto-remediation and scheduled-task caller-hash boundaries have focused tests

secret_scan.summary: Current repository files and complete Git history passed the secret scanner; the current registry-backed high-threshold dependency audit reported zero known vulnerabilities.
evidence: npm audit --audit-level=high on 2026-07-17: zero known vulnerabilities

access_policy.summary: A fresh authenticated dashboard read-only export proves the Parent Coach Desk Production Admin application covers parentcoachdesk.com/admin* and /api/admin* with one bounded allow policy. The policy admits exactly eepskalla@gmail.com and jeffthomas4@gmail.com; it does not allow everyone. The Worker runtime remains an independently tracked deployment-drift and post-deploy concern.

anonymous_access_probes.summary: A fresh anonymous GET-only probe covered all 38 current protected routes; every route returned a redacted 302 to the expected Cloudflare Access origin, including the protected trusted-relationship workspace.

authenticated_access_probes.summary: A non-mutating 37-route allowed/denied identity probe contract exists, but no redacted live results have been recorded.

database_backup.summary: A fresh complete local batch now covers all three production D1 databases and each export restores cleanly in isolated SQLite. Copies remain local-only, however; immutable independent offsite storage, R2 inventory/payload recovery, a separate verifier retrieval exercise, and separate-day proving runs are absent, so the backup gate cannot pass yet.

database_restore.summary: The five derived camp_scan_queue orphans were removed through an explicitly approved, exact-count production repair. A fresh post-repair export restored locally with integrity_check=ok and zero foreign-key violations; organizations were not written.

r2_recovery.summary: Owner accepted an empty-scope not-applicable disposition on 2026-07-17 (disposition A). The production PHOTOS bucket 'activityradar-photos' is empty at 0 objects / 0 bytes, so there is no production payload to export or sample. The disposition is void if production R2 media is added later, which would require a fresh independent export plus representative retrieval and SHA-256 match proof. The prior synthetic staging R2 restore with matching SHA-256 remains the recovery-mechanism proof.

rollback_target.summary: The currently active, fully bound Worker version is pinned as the exact rollback target for the next approved release. The original code-upload version lacks three secret bindings and Pages exposes historical admin artifacts, so neither is accepted.

rollback_rehearsal.summary: A controlled staging-only Worker rollback moved 100% of isolated staging traffic to a compatible prior revision, verified public, health, and readiness endpoints, then restored the exact current revision. The rehearsal did not mutate production or bound data resources and does not substitute for data recovery proof.

customer_journeys.summary: The current production Worker passes populated directory reflow at 320, 360, 390 and 430px, plus a fresh 640x320 landscape check of the populated directory and representative detail route, with no measured horizontal overflow. The directory detail route passes 320px reflow; production main has tabindex -1 and direct skip-link activation moves focus to MAIN#main. A fresh bounded GET-only monitor passed home, directory, privacy, terms, health, and readiness on both production and verified staging. The camp-submission form renders at 320px, but the correction/removal/privacy page remains a safe email fallback because the durable trust-intake feature is deliberately false. Native keyboard dispatch through the available browser automation remains inconclusive, not failed. Screen-reader behavior, real touch, 200% zoom, safe-area and virtual-keyboard behavior, constrained-network failure, and complete form/subscription/payment journeys remain pending.

notification_receipt.summary: Resend confirms the original staging-only internal administrator alert was delivered, but a fresh read-only inspection of the approved #pcd-alerts channel found no matching drill alert. A current secret-name-only inventory confirms the isolated staging Worker has both Resend and Slack secret names, but cannot prove delivery or receipt. An accepted replacement staging submission is therefore not treated as channel delivery. Reconcile or rotate the configured Slack webhook, then perform one approved synthetic drill and record both provider/channel receipt and Jeff Thomas acknowledgement before the operator path is considered end to end.

failure_isolation.summary: A local integrated simulation proves D1, Forge, scheduler, notification-ambiguity and public-monitor isolation, but environment-level failure and receipt evidence remain absent.

open_risk_decision.summary: Open stop-ship risks have not been explicitly accepted or closed for this candidate. This includes a 2026-07-17 unintended production-target deployment that was restored to the exact approved Plan 015 version within approximately 56 seconds; no operator-initiated data mutation occurred, but the evidence does not claim absence of third-party requests. The deployment-target prevention control and its review remain required.

deploy_approval.summary: Jeff approved production deployment of the reviewed Plan 015 repair. Commit bf4c424 was deployed as Worker version 35449367-a085-4096-bb7b-6886c048cea5 with 100% traffic. This gate covers the last deployed commit only; deploying the current candidate requires fresh approval.

migration_approval.summary: Read-only production evidence proves the directory DB is the incompatible Activity Radar graph lineage. The live Worker is bound to a separate empty PCD operational D1 database in WNAM, but all PCD migrations 0011 through 0022 remain pending and the trust/notification tables are absent. Staging uses separate synthetic-directory and operations databases; PCD_OPS_DB is migrated through 0022 there and its pre- and post-migration exports restored separately. No production migration or customer-data write has occurred. Any production migration remains separately approval-gated and requires independent offsite backup/retrieval coverage.

post_deploy_observation.summary: A bounded, unauthenticated GET-only monitor completed after the Plan 015 deployment: home, directory, privacy, terms, health, and readiness each returned the expected 200 response. This immediate availability observation does not replace the separately pending Access, notification, backup/recovery, or complete-journey gates. It covers the last deployed commit only; the current candidate has not been deployed.
